title: vanilla enchantments plus
description: A mod that adds more mods to vanilla minecraft
body:
Currently made enchantments:
Swiftness; boots enchantment, an enchantment that gives you speed 1 for each level goes upto level 3:
Lifesteal; weapon enchantment, an enchantment that lifesteals a fraction of the damage you deal to enemys reduced by armor worn

join my discord to give me ideas
